Gist.accessToken~: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) with the gist scope (secret, max:100)
Gist.gistId~: Id of the gist to back up to; created automatically on first push (string)

layout.mode~: How open notes are displayed: tabs (one note at a time) or river (all stacked) (option:tabs,river)

themes.importUrl~: URL of the themes manifest JSON imported by the Theme Importer (string)
